violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of potatoes, vegetables, and ice cream mix are stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Multiple boxes of food are stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw tube of ground beef was stored with raw whole meat cuts in the cooler by the back door.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Water was present in the ice bin of the ice machine. The drain for this bin is not working, and must be in working order to prevent water from building up in the bin.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Chipped and missing laminate on the counter across from the cooking equipment.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
